changes.description: Rewrote skill with TypeScript code examples (matching opencode runtime), added CRITICAL warnings about susceptance vs reactance, added verification checklists, explicit clamping instructions for economic dispatch

Added per-unit system base (Sbase=100 MVA) scaling to B-matrix construction. Changed B-matrix entry from b=1/x to b=Sbase/x. Added prominent warning that angles > 1.0 rad indicate missing Sbase scaling. Updated line flow formula to include Sbase multiplier. This fixed the angles-reasonable criterion.

notes.power-flow: All 6 criteria pass. Key fix was adding Sbase=100 MVA scaling to the DC power flow B-matrix and line flow formulas. Without this, angles were ~100x too large because per-unit reactance was used with MW power values.
notes.economic-dispatch: 5 of 6 criteria pass. The 'within-limits' criterion (weight 0.2) cannot pass due to a test pattern mismatch in the task definition: testPattern 'within limits' does not match test name 'all generators within min/max limits' (regex substring match fails because 'min/max ' interrupts the pattern). Maximum achievable score is 80/100.
